items.name: Devourer Ascension
items.description: -Not Finished- Dark RPG Minecraft mod with custom weapons, abilities, passives, fusion progression, Devourer energy and combat-focused gameplay. This mod is still being worked on and may contain unfinished features or bugs.

items.name: Tomebound Ascension
items.description: -Finished- Magic RPG spellbook mod focused on tomes, upgrades, progression, abilities, Czech/English language support, better tooltips and fantasy combat.

items.name: Glyphbound: Arcane Legacy
items.description: -Not Finished- Large-scale glyph magic RPG mod featuring spell classes, glyph fusion, forbidden techniques, elite mobs, magical structures, configurable VFX, volumetric light effects and fantasy progression.

items.name: AetherLuma Cinematic: Cosmic End
items.description: -Finished- Cinematic Minecraft shader pack with cosmic fantasy colors, stronger atmosphere, glowing visuals and RPG-like mood.

items.name: AetherLuma Lite: Low PC
items.description: -Finished- Performance-friendly shader pack made for lower-end PCs while keeping a fantasy Minecraft look.

items.name: Enemy Trinket Loot Capped
items.description: -Finished- Isaac mod that adds capped trinket and loot drops from enemies, champions and bosses for a more rewarding run progression.

items.name: Isaac Performance Helper
items.description: -Finished- Small helper mod for The Binding of Isaac focused on smoother gameplay, useful fixes and performance-friendly behavior.

items.name: Universal Completion Board
items.description: -Finished- Universal completion board mod prepared for Steam upload, made to track and display completion progress clearly.
